seed_text: In the tranquil landscape, and especially in the distant line of the horizon, man beholds somewhat as beautiful as his own nature
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing: gold spots, breeze, sea, life, death, earth.
dan_extract:
breeze and sea have a repeating, lasting rhythm that gets smaller and smaller over time.
there is a spot where the gold spots seem to bleed into the breeze, pulling everything apart.
claim_status: NO_CLAIM
